title: TCPING
description: Ping a TCP port to monitor network connectivity and latency
description_cn: Ping TCP 端口以监控网络连接和延迟

host.title: Hostname or IP
host.description: Target hostname, IPv4, or IPv6 address. Supports host:port format (e.g. example.com:443)
host.description_cn: 目标主机名、IPv4 或 IPv6 地址。支持 host:port 格式（如 example.com:443）

port.title: Port
port.description: TCP port number on the target

interval.title: Interval (seconds)
interval.description: Interval between sending probes. Real number allowed with dot as decimal separator
interval.description_cn: 发送探测包的时间间隔。支持小数（点号作为小数点分隔符）

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Time to wait for a response. 0 means infinite timeout
timeout.description_cn: 等待响应的超时时间。0 表示无限超时

maxProbes.title: Max Probes
maxProbes.description: Stop after this many probes regardless of result. 0 means no limit
maxProbes.description_cn: 达到此探测次数后停止，无论结果如何。0 表示无限制

retryResolve.title: Retry DNS Resolution
retryResolve.description: Retry resolving hostname after N failed probes. Useful for testing DNS load balancing (GSLB)
retryResolve.description_cn: 在 N 次探测失败后重新解析主机名。用于测试 DNS 负载均衡 (GSLB)

sourceInterface.title: Source Interface
sourceInterface.description: Network interface name or source IP address to bind to (e.g. eth2, 192.168.1.10)
sourceInterface.description_cn: 要绑定的网络接口名称或源 IP 地址（例如 eth2、192.168.1.10）

ipv4Only.title: IPv4 Only
ipv4Only.description: Only resolve and use IPv4 addresses
ipv4Only.description_cn: 仅解析和使用 IPv4 地址

ipv6Only.title: IPv6 Only
ipv6Only.description: Only resolve and use IPv6 addresses
ipv6Only.description_cn: 仅解析和使用 IPv6 地址

showTimestamp.title: Show Timestamp
showTimestamp.description: Display date and time in probe output
showTimestamp.description_cn: 在探测输出中显示日期和时间

noColor.title: No Color
noColor.description_cn: 禁用 ANSI 彩色输出

showFailuresOnly.title: Show Failures Only
showFailuresOnly.description: Only display failed probes, omit successes
showFailuresOnly.description_cn: 仅显示失败的探测，隐藏成功的

showSourceAddress.title: Show Source Address
showSourceAddress.description: Display the source IP address and port used for probes
showSourceAddress.description_cn: 显示用于探测的源 IP 地址和端口

jsonOutput.title: JSON Output
jsonOutput.description: Output probe results in JSON format
jsonOutput.description_cn: 以 JSON 格式输出探测结果

prettyJson.title: Pretty JSON
prettyJson.description: Use indentation for JSON output (requires JSON Output enabled)
prettyJson.description_cn: 为 JSON 输出使用缩进（需要启用 JSON 输出）

csvPath.title: CSV Output File
csvPath.description: Save probe results to CSV file. Stats summary saved with _stats suffix
csvPath.description_cn: 将探测结果保存到 CSV 文件。统计摘要以 _stats 后缀保存

dbPath.title: SQLite Database
dbPath.description: Save probe results to SQLite database file
dbPath.description_cn: 将探测结果保存到 SQLite 数据库文件

nonInteractive.title: Non-Interactive Mode
nonInteractive.description: Run in background mode (e.g. with nohup or as a service)
nonInteractive.description_cn: 以后台模式运行（例如使用 nohup 或作为服务）
